title: Principal Product Designer — AI Platform
description: Citrine Analytics builds AI-powered data analytics platforms for Fortune 500 companies. Our flagship product uses natural language queries to let non-technical users generate complex data analyses through a conversational interface. We're hiring a Principal Product Designer to own the design vision for our AI analytics experience.
responsibilities: Define the end-to-end design strategy for our AI analytics platform — from natural language query input to data visualization output
Lead the design of agent-driven analytics workflows: how the agent interprets ambiguous requests, asks clarifying questions, and presents findings
Establish design standards for AI-generated content — how to visually differentiate between AI-suggested and user-initiated actions
Mentor a team of 4-6 designers, providing guidance on AI product design patterns and best practices
Present design proposals to executive leadership and align cross-functional stakeholders on the product vision
Own the AI experience layer of our design system — defining patterns for agent responses, uncertainty states, and recommendation interfaces
requirements: 8+ years of product design experience, with 3+ years specifically on AI or data-heavy products
Demonstrated experience leading design strategy at a principal/IC7 level
Deep understanding of AI/ML capabilities — you've shipped AI features and understand the engineering constraints
Strong portfolio showing data visualization, complex workflow design, and AI product experience
Executive presence — you can present design thinking to C-suite audiences
Experience building and mentoring design teams
niceTo_have: Background in analytics, business intelligence, or data products
Experience with natural language interfaces and conversational UX
Published writing or speaking on AI design
MBA or quantitative background (not required but valued in our org)
